title: Greenery🌿
description: Dynamic plant generator mod that makes the world greener!
body: Greenery🌿 is a powerful world-generation mod. - It generates a default set of plants, which can be modified or disabled. - It can create and generate custom plants. For more info, visit the [official Wiki](https://juraj-hrivnak.github.io/Greenery/). ## Features - Dynamically growing upland, submerged, floating and emergent plants. - Built-in integration with Fluidlogged API. - Out-of-box compatibility for all modded biomes. - Allows creating custom plants. - Powerful configuration options. ## Credits - Foreck: Barley texture - Foreck: Pickerelweed model and texture - Outrightwings: Nettle texture
